title: PGCIL Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 660 Junior Officer Trainee, Diploma Trainee Posts
description: The Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (PGCIL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 660 Junior Officer Trainee, Diploma Trainee, Junior Technician Trainee Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Diploma, B.E./B.Tech in Electrical, Electronics, Civil Engineering, CA, Any degree, B.E./B. Tech, ITI can apply for the PGCIL Notification 2026...
